    rates[i] <- rates_file[i][1]

rates_file <- readDelimitedDataFile("matrices/PC1.csv", header = TRUE, separator=",", rownames=FALSE)
rates
for (i in 1:rates_file.size()) {
rates[i] <- rates_file[i][1]
}
rates
fnFreeK(rates)
rates_file
rates
file <- "PC" + 1 + ".csv
file <- "PC" + 1 + ".csv"
file
contents <- readDelimitedDataFile(file, header = TRUE, separator=",", rownames=FALSE)
for (i in 1:65) {
    file <- "matrices/PC" + i + ".csv"
    contents <- readDelimitedDataFile(file, header = TRUE, separator=",", rownames=FALSE)
    for (j in 1:rates_file.size()) {
        rates[j] <- rates_file[j][1]
    }
    Q[i] <- fnFreeK(rates)
}
Q[4]
